## Contact

Bugs? Feature requests? Feedback? You can contact BlitzStars in the following ways:

- On the official WoT: Blitz forums ( [EU](http://forum.wotblitz.eu/index.php?/topic/16777-blitzstars-beta/unread/) [NA](http://forum.wotblitz.com/index.php?/topic/32137-blitzstarscom-beta/unread/) [Asia](http://forum.wotblitz.asia/index.php?/topic/6149-blitzstarscom/unread/))
- By email - SockRobber at BlitzStars.com

## Support BlitzStars

BlitzStars.com development time and server costs come completely out of my own pocket. If you appreciate BlitzStars, and are in a position to support, please see the [**supporters page**](https://www.blitzstars.com/supporters) for more details about becoming a supporter.

If you would like to be a clan supporter please contact me for details. Note that there are limited clan supporter slots. More details are on the [**supporters page**](https://www.blitzstars.com/supporters).
